creator: sab@seanet.com
text:
On Wed, Feb 17, 1999 at 12:31:08AM +0200, Sheldon Hearn wrote:
 > >Description: 
 > 
 > 	Currently the mail/nmh port configures nmh to use SMTP as the
 > 	delivery method for outgoing mail. This is not ideal, since
 > 	many machines will not accept SMTP connections from localhost,
 > 	either because they run no listening daemon, or because they're
 > 	wrapped up anally.
 
 Since I don't have experience in enough different environments to
 really judge what the default should be, I just forwarded a request
 for comments off to the nmh-workers@math.gatech.edu mailing list (and
 bcc'd you, Sheldon).  I think your request is reasonable, though, but
 I'd like to see if I get any comments from there first...
 
 Scott Blachowicz
